name: work-suite
description: The four-phase workflow primitive for orchestrator agents: ideate, plan, execute, and merge, plus long-horizon execution discipline.

interface.shortDescription: Ideation, planning, doing, merging, and autonomous execution skills.
interface.longDescription: Work Suite packages the canonical Ourostack workflow skills for Codex and other agent runtimes: work-ideator, work-planner, work-doer, work-merger, autopilot, and inch-worm.
